vuln_q_0043_0002.title: Polynomial regular expression used on uncontrolled data
vuln_q_0043_0002.description: This [regular expression](1) that depends on a [user-provided value](2) may run slow on strings with many repetitions of '?'.

vuln_q_0071_0001.title: Polynomial regular expression used on uncontrolled data
vuln_q_0071_0001.description: This [regular expression](1) that depends on a [user-provided value](2) may run slow on strings starting with '<' and with many repetitions of '<'.

vuln_q_0071_0001.title: Flask app is run in debug mode
vuln_q_0071_0001.description: A Flask app appears to be run in debug mode. This may allow an attacker to run arbitrary code through the debugger.

vuln_q_0014_0001.title: Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data
vuln_q_0014_0001.description: [Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.
